description.zh: 把产品需求文档整理成目标、范围、流程、风险和待确认问题。
description.en: Turn product requirements into goals, scope, flows, risks, and open questions.

placeholder.zh: 粘贴 PRD 或产品说明...

description.zh: 从竞品描述或截图笔记中提炼定位、功能、差异点和机会。
description.en: Extract positioning, features, differences, and opportunities from competitor notes.

placeholder.zh: 粘贴竞品页面、功能说明或观察笔记...
placeholder.en: Paste competitor pages, feature notes, or observations...

description.zh: 根据主题生成短视频口播脚本、镜头节奏和标题。
description.en: Generate short-form video narration, scene beats, and titles.

placeholder.zh: 粘贴主题、卖点、受众或素材...
placeholder.en: Paste topic, selling points, audience, or raw material...
